name: gpt-5-6-model-router
description: Autonomy-first GPT-5.6 routing with advisory defaults and bounded delegation.

interface.longDescription: Let the root autonomously choose whether and how to delegate, with cost-aware Luna, Terra, and Sol defaults, optional compact handoffs, bounded one-level descendants, and advisory critical review.
defaultPrompt: $setup-gpt56-model-router Install or upgrade the schema-4 model router and depth capability.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this task with autonomous cost-aware GPT-5.6 routing.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this critical change with advisory independent review and root override authority.
